node.text: John has been playing professional basketball for just under a year.

node.text: John has been working on improving his overall game, getting endorsement deals, and learning how to market himself to boost his brand.

node.text: Strength training improved John's shooting accuracy, agility, and speed, giving him confidence on the court.
